Class ViewDiscussionBoard

java.lang.Object
guiDiscussion.ViewDiscussionBoard
public class ViewDiscussionBoard extends Object
View for the discussion board GUI.

This class defines and lays out the widgets used by students, staff, and admins to interact with discussion posts and replies. The view delegates user actions to the controller and displays formatted output returned by the model/service layers.

Students User Story alignment: create post, update post, read all posts, keyword search, create reply, and list replies for a specific post.

  • Method Details

    • displayDiscussionBoard

      public static void displayDiscussionBoard(javafx.stage.Stage ps, entityClasses.User user, int roleToReturn)
      Displays the discussion board scene for the active user.
      Parameters:
      ps - application stage
      user - active logged-in user
      roleToReturn - role id for return navigation (1=admin, 2=student, else=staff)

    • showError

      protected static void showError(String message)
      Shows an error/information dialog with the provided message.
      Parameters:
      message - message to display
